OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY FRANK C SIMMONS WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-11-1999 CONTINUED FROM FEB-24-1999 TO APR-14-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSETCARE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIANO, JAMES B. $3,067.08 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $273.04 INTEREST, $147.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,147.12
